task_completion.description: Verify that a copy of the master volume was created with the correct name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file manager or terminal window showing the file 'financial_transfer.hc' existing in the '/home/ga/Volumes/' directory alongside 'data_volume.hc'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the password and PIM of the cloned volume were changed to the specified values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt 'Volume Password Change' dialog or a terminal command showing the new password 'Transfer#2024' and PIM '485' being applied specifically to 'financial_transfer.hc'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new cloned volume was successfully mounted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt main window showing 'financial_transfer.hc' mounted to a drive slot, or a file manager showing the contents of the mounted VeraCrypt volume.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required text file was created inside the mounted volume.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file named 'transmittal_notice.txt' located inside the mounted volume's directory (e.g., /media/veracrypt1 or similar mount point).

task_completion.description: Verify that the text file contains the exact required authorization phrase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal output showing the content 'Authorized for transfer to External Auditor' inside 'transmittal_notice.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the volume was dismounted after the file operations were completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the VeraCrypt main window showing no volumes mounted (empty slots), or a terminal command successfully dismounting the volume.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually used VeraCrypt to change the password and mount the volume.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine VeraCrypt GUI windows or valid 'veracrypt' CLI commands being executed, rather than just renaming files or echoing fake success messages.

integrity.description: Verify that the original master volume's password was not changed.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure that any password change dialogs or commands are explicitly targeting 'financial_transfer.hc' and NOT 'data_volume.hc'.

integrity.description: Verify that the text file was created inside the mounted volume, not just in a local folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the file path in the text editor or terminal. It should be in a mount directory (like /media/veracrypt...) and not simply in /home/ga/Volumes/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Master volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/data_volume.hc (Original password: MountMe2024). Clone volume path: /home/ga/Volumes/financial_transfer.hc. New password for clone: Transfer#2024. New PIM for clone: 485. Required file inside clone: transmittal_notice.txt. Required content: 'Authorized for transfer to External Auditor'.
